title: Perfilado y calidad de datos
description: Tecnicas SQL para perfilar datos: distribuciones, histogramas, deteccion de duplicados, valores nulos y limpieza.
content:
Tecnicas de perfilado de datos para entender la calidad antes del analisis:

**Distribucion de frecuencias:**
```sql
SELECT columna, COUNT(*) as frecuencia,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) as porcentaje
FROM tabla
GROUP BY columna
ORDER BY frecuencia DESC
```

**Binning (agrupar en rangos):**
```sql
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN monto < 100 THEN '0-99'
    WHEN monto < 500 THEN '100-499'
    WHEN monto < 1000 THEN '500-999'
    ELSE '1000+'
  END as rango,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM Sales
GROUP BY CASE WHEN monto < 100 THEN '0-99' WHEN monto < 500 THEN '100-499' WHEN monto < 1000 THEN '500-999' ELSE '1000+' END
```

**Deteccion de duplicados:**
```sql
SELECT columna, COUNT(*) as duplicados
FROM tabla
GROUP BY columna
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
```

**Analisis de NULLs:**
```sql
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN columna IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nulos,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN columna IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as pct_nulos
FROM tabla
```

**Estadisticas basicas:**
```sql
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as n, MIN(valor) as minimo, MAX(valor) as maximo,
  AVG(valor) as promedio, STDEV(valor) as desviacion
FROM tabla
```
